title: - Cut-up logic (letter > word > sentence > idea)
content:
- Cut-up logic (letter > word > sentence > idea)
- Ritual language / evolving syntax
- Language remixes across:
- Human languages (ENG, SPN, FRA, JAP, GAE, LAT…)
- Codebases (Python, JavaScript, Swift…)
- Aesthetic dialects (dream logic, sacred scripts)

Each project has a **procedural mode**:
- Auto-generated mutations
- Scriptable remix engines
- Exportable templates + public docs

---

### GitHub + Consumer Layers

You are producing **parallel output layers**:
- **GitHub:** public documentation, version logs, open-source scripts
- **Consumer:** zines, apps, essays, museum formats, online classes
- **Business-facing:** product kits, licensing modules, creative tools
- **Academic:** archive of myth/religion/history/pop culture for citation and pedagogy (CV-builder without needing academia’s approval)
